title: phlox caryophylla
intro: Phlox caryophylla, also known as rock phlox or moss phlox, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its pink, purple, or white flowers and fragrant foliage. The medicinal properties of Phlox caryophylla include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and reduce stress and anxiety. Phlox caryophylla can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
